rationale: Threshold-based overdue detection + aging-bucket bucketing + templated monthly summary — fully mechanical.
Monthly retainer report requires editorial judgment on health narrative and upsell hook framing.
Priority + SLA assignment from unstructured inbox requires moderate classification judgment and prose acknowledgment.
SLA breach detection against thresholds and rule-based escalation routing — no synthesis, purely mechanical.
Autonomous codebase edits under a complexity gate — code reasoning and quality judgments are high-stakes.
Webhook → parse booking fields → CRM write → notify team — deterministic pipeline, no synthesis.
Follow-up email requires tone judgment and optional human-review gate; prose must feel personalized.
Fixed-template reminder email + messaging ping triggered 24h before meeting — fully templated, no judgment.
Deterministic webhook-to-onboarding pipeline: OTP, KB stub, welcome email, team ping — rule-driven steps.
KB phase detection → templated milestone email + team update with dedup — mechanical state-machine logic.
Monthly portfolio metrics with trend deltas require numeric synthesis and narrative framing for client delivery.
Tiered stall escalation on time thresholds with fixed channel routing — rule-based, no synthesis needed.
Calendar mirror with create/update/delete and id mapping — pure data-sync, deterministic CRUD.
Time-threshold reminders at 48h/4h/15min with per-threshold dedup — fully rule-driven, no judgment.
Overdue detection → list move + comment + alert — rule-triggered pipeline, pattern memory is just state storage.
Multi-channel urgency + intent classification from unstructured inbound requires moderate NLU judgment.
Duplicate detection + confidence-gated human-review queue needs semantic similarity judgment beyond simple rules.
Prep reminder + status ping with idempotent per-event state — templated notifications, mechanical.
Action-item extraction from meeting notes + distribution requires NLU and editorial judgment on what matters.
Open-ended messaging classification into routes needs intent reasoning; confidence gate adds moderate judgment.
Critical/Warning signal triage with duplicate detection needs threshold + semantic judgment; low-confidence gate.
Three-tier classification from webhook payloads with multi-destination fan-out; confidence gate implies ambiguity.
Spreadsheet polling + numeric scoring + write-back + broadcast — deterministic scoring pipeline.
Tier-adaptive follow-up email requires prose generation with tone calibration per recipient tier + retry queue.
PR/commit discovery + ADR wiring requires understanding code context and linking intent to decisions.
Full ADR authoring with enrichment interview, alternatives matrix, and sign-off gate — deep technical reasoning required.
review_mode=always + Reaffirm/Re-evaluate/Deprecate decisions on technical ADRs — consequential, high-judgment reasoning.
Six-pass legal contract analysis — nuance, high stakes, errors are costly; quality is the primary deliverable.
Statistical significance gating + promote/revert proposals — review_mode=always but judgment is mostly analytical/numeric.
Threat scoring 1-10 + deep abuse analysis + drafted reports — security reasoning is high-stakes and nuanced.
Billing scan against thresholds with conditional anomaly alert — rule-based detection, no narrative synthesis.
Database-wide signature mining with confidence-gated auto-updates requires pattern recognition across varied records.
Daily incremental scan merging fresh signature fields into existing contacts — structured data merge, deterministic.
Stale-contact flagging by age threshold + history pruning — rule-based DB health sweep, no synthesis.
Email signature parsing with confidence scoring and conflict-aware DB merge needs moderate NLU + heuristic judgment.
CRM quality scoring across multiple dimensions + safe auto-fix selection requires moderate analytical judgment.
DB reachability probe + Critical incident creation on failure — binary health check, rule-driven escalation.
Cross-referencing deploy timestamps against error spike timelines requires correlation reasoning, not just threshold rules.
